title: symphyotrichum foliaceum var. cusickii
intro: Symphyotrichum foliaceum var. cusickii, also known as Cusick's aster or western aster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum foliaceum var. cusickii include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is used to make salves and ointments for topical application, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
